title: Morgan Stanley Is Right, Air Products and Chemicals Is A Top Dividend Stock
text: In this article, I start by taking a closer look at the (potential) future of hydrogen, one of the areas Air Products and Chemicals is focused on. Air Products and Chemicals was named one of the best dividend stocks to buy by Morgan Stanley. In this article, I explain why I agree with that.

title: Air Products to start construction of second liquid hydrogen plant in Rotterdam
text: New plant brings additional liquid hydrogen capacity to Europe ROTTERDAM, The Netherlands , Sept. 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE: APD) today announced plans to start construction of a second hydrogen liquefaction plant in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

title: Air Products Membrane Solutions to Introduce PRISM® GreenDry Membrane Separator at RNG WORKS Technical Workshop & Trade Show Expo
text: LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa. , Sept. 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Air Products (NYSE:APD), the global leader in the production of gas separation and purification membranes, will highlight its new PRISM® GreenDry membrane separator for the biogas industry at the RNG Works Technical Workshop and Trade Expo at the Music City Center, in Nashville, Tennessee, from September 20-22.

title: 2 Stocks With Promising Earnings Growth Estimates
text: Predicting the future in investing is impossible, but companies with strong business models have a higher potential to outperform those without significant competitive advantages. I like to look for companies that consistently deliver dividend increases as well, as dividend growth often indicates a solid business model and a committment to shareholder returns.

title: Imperial advances renewable diesel plans, awards hydrogen contract to Air Products
text: CALGARY, Alberta & LEHIGH VALLEY, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Imperial announces long-term contract with Air Products to supply low-carbon hydrogen for proposed renewable diesel complex at Strathcona refinery.
